Id1.text: The asteroid 10 Hygiea, once called A900 GA, has the epoch date of 27th June 2015.

Id2.text: 10 Hygiea has an epoch date of June 27th 2015 and was formerly named A900 GA.

Id3.text: The asteroid, 10 Hygiea, was formally known as A900 GA and has an epoch date of 27th June 2015.
